metadata.source: OurAirports airports.csv (scheduled_service=yes, IATA code present, heliports excluded) plus explicitly curated international hubs
metadata.notes: IDs for the original catalog are retained; appended rows are assigned monotonically in deterministic order. Mainland China and Hong Kong/Macau/Taiwan are represented separately from international hubs.
